summary: Iteration 26: Full back+front verification of (a) Customers crosswalk ≥5 noise filter, (b) ProductThumbnail on Products/ReOrder/IBT + admin editor modal, (c) Pricing Changes page + /api/analytics/price-changes. 18/18 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend flows all green.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L2169: `from datetime import datetime, timedelta` lives inside the handler — harmless, but the module already imports datetime at the top; move for consistency.

server.py L2271: sales_change_pct denominator uses `or 1` when prev sales is 0, which silently hides div-by-zero. Since the outer `if (p.get('total_sales') or 0)` already guards, the `or 1` is dead code — safe to drop.
thumbnails.py L128 bulk upsert loops sync upserts; fine at 500-item cap but a bulk_write would be 1 round-trip. Nice-to-have, not blocking.
Customers.jsx L1165 uses a hardcoded CROSSWALK_MIN_SHARED = 5 — acceptable but consider exposing as a config/env if business wants to tweak the threshold per market later.
test_credentials: admin@vivofashiongroup.com / VivoAdmin!2026 — login via POST /api/auth/login + localStorage 'vivo_bi_token' is the fastest harness.
seed_data_creation: Test created + cleaned up TEST_STYLE_* and TEST_BULK_* thumbnails via pytest fixture — nothing persisted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified endpoints: POST/GET /api/thumbnails, POST /api/thumbnails/lookup, POST /api/thumbnails/bulk, DELETE /api/thumbnails/{style}, GET /api/analytics/price-changes. Admin modal testids: thumbnail-editor-url, thumbnail-editor-save, thumbnail-editor-remove (Cancel has no testid — minor). Products page has 240 thumb elements (top20+new+SOR), ReOrder 100, IBT 100. Pricing 'Today' preset yields 1 row by design; use 'Last Month' for 97 rows. Customers crosswalk shows 'No store pairs share ≥5…' UpstreamNotReady when all pairs are below threshold, and threshold note correctly shows 'N low-overlap pairs hidden'.

backend.thumbnails_crud: create→lookup→update→list→delete→404 all pass; bad URL → 422; missing → 404
backend.thumbnails_bulk: upserted=2 returned; both rows cleaned up
backend.price_changes_default: response contains rows/current_from/current_to/previous_from/previous_to/window_days/min_units/min_change_pct/count. Window for 2026-01-01→2026-02-01 is 32 days, previous window = 2025-11-30 → 2025-12-31 (correctly inclusive)
backend.price_changes_row_shape: each row has style_name, brand, collection, product_type, current_avg_price, previous_avg_price, price_change_pct, direction∈{increase,decrease}, current_units, previous_units, units_change_pct, current_sales, previous_sales, sales_change_pct, price_elasticity

frontend.pricing_page: Renders at /pricing, title 'Pricing Changes', all 4 KPI cards present, direction toggle + brand multiselect + min units + min |ASP Δ| filters all have data-testid, table with 10 required columns renders. All prices 'KES' prefixed with commas (e.g. KES 3,577, KES -3,884,596). 'Last Month' preset shows 97 styles; 'Today' shows 1 row as documented.
frontend.sidebar_nav: data-testid='nav-pricing' present, coin icon between IBT and CEO Report as specified.
frontend.reorder_thumbnails: 100 thumbnail elements on /re-order with 2-letter monogram placeholders (VS, VZ, VW, VM, VD, VL, SB, VI, ...)
frontend.ibt_thumbnails: 100 thumbnail elements on /ibt with monogram placeholders
frontend.editor_modal: Click on thumb opens modal titled 'PRODUCT THUMBNAIL' with style name, VZ placeholder, 'IMAGE URL' input (testid=thumbnail-editor-url, placeholder https://cdn.example.com/sku.jpg), Save (testid=thumbnail-editor-save), Cancel (no testid — minor nit), Remove (testid=thumbnail-editor-remove) buttons, helper text 'Must be a direct https:// link to a web-safe image (JPG/PNG/WebP).'
frontend.customers_crosswalk: data-testid=customer-crosswalk-section + data-testid=crosswalk-threshold-note both render. Footnote reads 'Showing pairs with ≥5 shared customers to filter out statistical noise — 2 low-overlap pairs hidden.' On 'Last Month' preset the table collapses to the UpstreamNotReady empty state ('No store pairs share ≥5 customers…') because no pair cleared the threshold — which is the intended noise filter. No rows with shared_customers < 5 are shown.
